untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) spread percentile calculation vs 10-day rolling distribution (not available as direct indicator), (2) limit order execution probability estimate based on bid/ask level impact (not available), (3) order flow imbalance favoring taker's side (directional volume imbalance cannot be reliably inferred from vol_ratio_20 alone). Proxies used: bb_bandwidth approximates narrow spreads; vol_ratio_20 approximates order imbalance. These are imperfect substitutes for true microstructure metrics.
translation_notes: Context-dependent direction interpreted as SHORT based on source text stating 'Sellers who can recognize this situation should take liquidity.' Entry requires narrow spreads (bb_bandwidth < 0.45 as percentile proxy) AND volume imbalance favoring sellers (vol_ratio_20 > 0.55). Exit when spreads widen or position filled. Regime set to TRENDING_DOWN and RANGING per signal specification, though microstructure signals typically apply across regimes. True implementation requires access to order book spread percentiles and directional flow data not available in standard OHLCV indicators.
